title: 恒生聚源授权
description: 连接您的恒生聚源 MCP，用于查询金融结构化数据、研究报告、公司公告、新闻资讯、条件选股、宏观行业、工商企业数据。Token 与接口地址仅存储在本机 ~/.workbuddy 下。
description_en: Connect to Gildata MCP to query structured financial data, research reports, corporate announcements, news, conditional stock selection, macroeconomic & industry data, as well as enterprise business data.Token and API address are stored locally in ~/.workbuddy only.
docLabel: 如何使用恒生聚源 MCP 并获取授权 token
docLabel_en: How to Use Gildata MCP and Get Your Access Token

fields.label: Access Token
fields.placeholder: 请填写恒生聚源下发的 Access Token
fields.description: 用于访问恒生聚源 MCP 的个人访问令牌。
fields.description_en: Personal access token for accessing Gildata MCP.
